name: Nagaoka International Corporation
summary: Nagaoka International Corporation develops and sells water intake and treatment systems, and screen internals to oil refining and petrochemical industries worldwide. It offers screen internals for oil refining, and petrochemical and chemical fertilizer complexes. The company also provides screens used for groundwater intake purposes; and CHEMILES, a groundwater treatment system that is used in food processing, linen industry, hospitals, and other applications. In addition, it provides HiSIS, which is high-speed seabed infiltration system for seawater desalination; and ENERLES, a water treatment system for dam water. The company was founded in 1934 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Nagaoka International Corporation is a subsidiary of HAMADA Co., Ltd.
